title: Water Marbling Paint with Concentrated Painting Liquid for Kids - Arts and Crafts Birthday Gifts for Girls & Boys Ideal Creative Toys for Kids Age 6 7 8 9 10 11 12
features: Magic water marbling paint：Break away from the traditional painting mode on paper, now pick a refreshing painting way - Paint...on water! Just drop the paint into the water,swirl to any pattern and transfer to paper, easter eggs, stone, scarf, vase or any other smooth surface!

Have fun right away：Marbling paint kit is designed with 2 packs of concentrated fluid. Just mix water, shake & pour. No waiting time, and start this good project with family and friends immediately, spread imagination and hand-on ability.

Safe and Nontoxic : You will get two more bags of carrageenan Powder as well, which is also safe, non-toxic, and environmentally friendly. Please take one full spoon in 300 ml warm water and stir the carrageenan slowly until no large lumps remain, and let it stand for 4-6 hours before use. Patience is key to success. Our product meets the ASTM D-4236 requirement.

Creative Arts & Crafts Kits : Our Crafts Kits provide everything you need to embark on your magic marbling journey. It includes 8 colors of paint (16ml each), 2 packs of Carrageenan powder (16 time), 2 bags of painting Luqid( 2 time),a B5 size large Art Troy, 20 sheets of quality paper, 2 needles, 2 pipette, a painting comb, a painting brush, 2 measuring spoons, and manual.

Perfect Gift Choice: Our marbling paint kit is perfect for various occasions, such as art and crafts classes, STEM projects, or DIY activities. It guarantees hours of creative enjoyment and makes a thoughtful gift for Parent-Kids Bonding Day, Easter, Thanksgiving, and Christmas. Let your little ones delight in crafting their own unique patterns with this perfect gift for kids. Suitable for kids aged 6 years and above.
description: Product Description CREATE YOUR MASTERPIECE WITH EASE It is packed with everything a budding artist needs for their very own marbling art studio! Our larger size, a B5 size large art troy, will help you explore even more imaginative designs. NO TIME WAITING! Inside our Marbling Kit, you’ll find 2 packs of concentrated marbling solution, which are easy to use! Just mix with water, shake, pour and get creative ! No need to wait! Besides, our art kit features pre-measured carrageenan powder, with two packs of powder you can marbling for 16 times！ A WORLD OF COLOR Make It Unique, layer paint, swirl to any pattern and transfer to paper, easter eggs, stone, scarf, vase，shoe or any other smooth surface! GREAT FAMILY BONDING ACTIVITY Marbling art is an ideal parent-child quality time activity. It’s the perfect opportunity to share creative ideas and learn unique art techniques together.
